1994.reason: [The constructor AST.Stmt(Exp exp) sets type=0, but the problem requires outputting "<Stmt>" for all statement types. However, when exp is null (empty statement), this constructor doesn't properly handle the type assignment, leading to missing "<Stmt>" output in parser.txt]
